form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Last start 2nd of 9 at this track on March 28 over 2213m, 6 len behind Power Seeker carrying 56kg at $9.01. Before that won by a nose at this track March 12 over 1609m defeating Secured Landing carrying 55kg at $2.54. Well placed. Should prove hard to beat.

form.formComment: Comes here off a 35-day let-up. At the latest run 5th of 7 at this track on March 12 over 1609m, 6 len behind Sharp Spark with 56kg at $25.14. The start before that 2nd in a small field at this track on February 20 over 1811m, 1.75 len behind Flat On with 56kg at $2.75. Cannot be ruled out despite a lacklustre effort last time.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Last start sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 4th of 9 at this track on March 28 over 2213m, 6 len behind Power Seeker with 56kg at $18.23. The start before that came from midfield and won by 6 len at this track March 14 over 1911m defeating First Trumpet with 56kg at $18.75. Capable of more ? worth another chance.
